mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : MsgSndrDsctnDAO.selectSndrDsctnCnt 설 명 : 발송내역 목록 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (
) CH INNER JOIN TB_LMS_MSG MSG ON CH.MSG_ID = MSG.MSG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON MSG.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON SBJCT.DEPT_ID = DEPT.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON DEPT.ORG_ID = ORG.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MSG_RCV_TRGTR TRGTR ON CH.MSG_ID = TRGTR.MSG_ID AND CH.RCVR_ID = TRGTR.USER_ID WHERE 1 = 1

/* SQL ID : MsgSndrDsctnDAO.selectSndrDsctnSmry 설 명 : 발송내역 채널별 요약 조회 */ SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN CH.SNDNG_GBNCD = 'PUSH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS PUSH_TOTAL_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN CH.SNDNG_GBNCD = 'PUSH' AND CH.SNDNG_RSLT_CD = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS PUSH_SUCC_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN CH.SNDNG_GBNCD = 'PUSH' AND CH.SNDNG_RSLT_CD = 'FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS PUSH_FAIL_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN CH.SNDNG_GBNCD = 'SHRTNT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS SHRTNT_TOTAL_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN CH.SNDNG_GBNCD = 'SHRTNT' AND CH.SNDNG_RSLT_CD = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS SHRTNT_SUCC_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN CH.SNDNG_GBNCD = 'SHRTNT' AND CH.SNDNG_RSLT_CD = 'FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS SHRTNT_FAIL_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN CH.SNDNG_GBNCD = 'EML' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS EML_TOTAL_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN CH.SNDNG_GBNCD = 'EML' AND CH.SNDNG_RSLT_CD = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS EML_SUCC_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN CH.SNDNG_GBNCD = 'EML' AND CH.SNDNG_RSLT_CD = 'FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS EML_FAIL_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN CH.SNDNG_GBNCD = 'ALIM_TALK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ALIMTALK_TOTAL_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN CH.SNDNG_GBNCD = 'ALIM_TALK' AND CH.SNDNG_RSLT_CD = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ALIMTALK_SUCC_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN CH.SNDNG_GBNCD = 'ALIM_TALK' AND CH.SNDNG_RSLT_CD = 'FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ALIMTALK_FAIL_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN CH.SNDNG_GBNCD = 'SMS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS SMS_TOTAL_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN CH.SNDNG_GBNCD = 'SMS' AND CH.SNDNG_RSLT_CD = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS SMS_SUCC_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN CH.SNDNG_GBNCD = 'SMS' AND CH.SNDNG_RSLT_CD = 'FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS SMS_FAIL_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN CH.SNDNG_GBNCD = 'LMS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS LMS_TOTAL_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN CH.SNDNG_GBNCD = 'LMS' AND CH.SNDNG_RSLT_CD = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS LMS_SUCC_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN CH.SNDNG_GBNCD = 'LMS' AND CH.SNDNG_RSLT_CD = 'FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS LMS_FAIL_CNT FROM (
) CH INNER JOIN TB_LMS_MSG MSG ON CH.MSG_ID = MSG.MSG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON MSG.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON SBJCT.DEPT_ID = DEPT.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON DEPT.ORG_ID = ORG.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MSG_RCV_TRGTR TRGTR ON CH.MSG_ID = TRGTR.MSG_ID AND CH.RCVR_ID = TRGTR.USER_ID WHERE 1 = 1
